title: GNtravel
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNtravel, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Could a jet fuel shortage really ruin your summer trip to Europe? What flyers should know
items.description: Concerns over a growing shortage of jet fuel on the continent have raised fears about potential flight cancellations if things don’t improve.

items.title: What's old is new again: Hilton's Conrad Athens The Ilisian opens today
items.description: The iconic Hilton Athens has been transformed into Greece's first Conrad.

items.title: 10 'coolest' vacation spots to escape the heat this summer
items.description: Whether you want to hike, ski or eat your way through top restaurants, here are 10 of the best destinations to escape the heat this summer.

items.title: Lufthansa's first Airbus A380 with upgraded business class debuts on flight to LAX
items.description: Lufthansa's first Airbus A380 with a new business class cabin entered service on Thursday flying between Munich and Los Angeles.

items.title: Last chance: Earn $250 bonus cash back with the Chase Freedom Unlimited
items.description: These welcome offers on the Chase Freedom Flex and the Chase Freedom Unlimited make them compelling options. Is now the right time to apply?
